text: "Flynn Rider nervously approaches an ivy-covered tower on a rocky cliff and climbs it using an arrow."
original_texts: Flynn Rider stands in a lush, green forest, facing a tall rocky cliff with a tower in the distance.
The tower is tall and covered in ivy, with a pointed roof and a window at the top.
Flynn Rider glances back nervously as he approaches the tower.
Flynn Rider begins to climb the rocky cliff using an arrow as a tool for climbing.

text: "Vined tower, cliffs."
original_texts: A tall, vine-covered tower stands against a bright blue sky, surrounded by rocky cliffs.

text: "Flynn enters, lands, closes window, checks satchel, smiles."
original_texts: Flynn Rider enters through the window of a tower, silhouetted against the bright light outside.
Flynn Rider lands inside the tower and closes the window.
Flynn Rider leans against the window, looking relieved.
Flynn Rider checks a satchel, smiling with satisfaction.

text: "Flynn eyes the satchel. Alarmed, Rapunzel grips a pan. Cut to the tower's interior."
original_texts: Flynn Rider continues to look at the satchel, appearing pleased.
Rapunzel suddenly appears behind a column, holding a frying pan above her head, looking alarmed.
Rapunzel looks at Flynn Rider with wide eyes, clutching the frying pan defensively.
The scene shifts to a view of the tower's interior, showing furniture and decorations.

text: "Flynn is unconscious."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor of the tower, face down. His bag is on the floor beside him.

text: "Rapunzel peeks over a mannequin, holding it tightly. Flynn Rider lies unconscious nearby as her long hair trails behind."
original_texts: Rapunzel, with wide eyes, peeks over the top of a mannequin, holding it tightly.
Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor next to his bag, while Rapunzel peeks cautiously from behind the mannequin.
Rapunzel slowly moves the mannequin closer to Flynn, her long hair trailing behind her.
Rapunzel peeks around the mannequin, looking concerned and curious, as the room's colorful wall designs are visible in the background.

text: Startled, Rapunzel touches Flynn.
original_texts: Rapunzel, wearing a purple dress, looks down with a concerned expression.
Rapunzel gently touches Flynn Rider's head as he lies on the floor.
Rapunzel's eyes widen in surprise as she reacts to something unexpected.

text: "Chameleon watches thoughtful Rapunzel."
original_texts: A small green chameleon is sitting on the floor, looking up with wide eyes.
Rapunzel, in a purple dress, is holding a frying pan, looking down with wide eyes and a concerned expression.
Rapunzel's expression softens as she looks down at the frying pan, appearing more thoughtful.

text: "Flynn's out cold; Rapunzel holds a frying pan."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor with his face turned to the side.
Rapunzel holds a frying pan above Flynn Rider's head, poised to strike.
The scene focuses on Flynn Rider's face, showing him still unconscious.

text: Pascal's face turns red as he sees a red face.
original_texts: Pascal, the chameleon, looks up with wide eyes.
Pascal glances at a red chalk drawing of a menacing face on the floor.
Pascal changes color to yellow, matching the face's expression.
Pascal turns red, mimicking the drawing's fierce look.
original_text: "Pascal sees a red face and turns red."

text: "Flynn is unconscious with a pan on his head; Rapunzel looks worried."
original_texts: Flynn Rider lies unconscious on the floor, his head turned to the side.
A frying pan is placed on Flynn's head by Rapunzel, who is off-screen.
Rapunzel's hand is visible, holding the frying pan firmly against Flynn's head.
Flynn starts to grimace, showing signs of waking up.
Rapunzel, with wide eyes and a worried expression, looks down at Flynn.
Rapunzel's expression shifts to one of contemplation, still holding the frying pan.

text: "Flynn Rider is unconscious, pan against his head."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor, his head turned to the side.
A frying pan is gently pressed against Flynn Rider's head by a hand holding the pan.

text: "Rapunzel lowers the frying pan, intrigued."
original_texts: Rapunzel is holding a frying pan, looking surprised and cautious.
Rapunzel's expression shifts to one of curiosity, lowering the frying pan slightly.
Rapunzel appears thoughtful, her eyes widening as she looks towards something off-screen.

text: "Flynn is out cold."
original_texts: Flynn Rider is lying unconscious on the floor with his eyes closed. The lighting is soft, casting gentle shadows on his face.

text: 优优独播剧场——YoYo Television Series Exclusive
Rapunzel, in a purple dress, leans forward with wide green eyes, surprised.
original_text: Rapunzel, with long blonde hair and wearing a purple dress, looks surprised and leans forward slightly. Her large green eyes are wide open.

text: Flynn Rider's eyes snap open in surprise.
original_text: Flynn Rider's eyes suddenly open wide, and he looks surprised.

text: Rapunzel peeks, eyes closed, raising a pan.
original_texts: Rapunzel is holding a frying pan, looking surprised and alert.
Rapunzel raises the frying pan above her head, closing her eyes tightly.
Rapunzel peeks with one eye open, still holding the frying pan aloft.
original_text: "Rapunzel raises a pan, eyes closed, peeking."

text: Rapunzel enters, clutching a frying pan defensively.
original_text: Rapunzel enters the room, holding a frying pan defensively.

text: Rapunzel strides to the wardrobe, determined.
original_text: Rapunzel approaches the wardrobe, looking determined.

text: She blocks the wardrobe with a chair.
original_text: She places a chair against the wardrobe door.

text: "Rapunzel looks worried."
original_texts: Rapunzel places her hand on her forehead, looking slightly worried.

text: Available on Disney+
Disney characters like Moana, Maui, Woody, and Buzz Lightyear appear together, with a 'Disney Kids' logo at the top left.
original_text: A montage of Disney characters, including Moana, Maui, Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and characters from Inside Out, is displayed. A 'Disney Kids' logo is visible on the top left.
